'''Yin Metal Snake''' is the 18th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 辛 Kanoto (yin metal, the luna-aligned face of occultation), and its branch is 巳 Mi, the [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's fire overcomes the stem's metal, the lower restraining the high.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Metal Dragon]] (node 17) and [[Yang Water Horse]] (node 19).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kanoto (辛)]] — yin metal
* '''Branch:''' [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake (巳)]] — yin fire
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' occultation

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Metal Dragon]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Water Horse]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1062057}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
